basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 11 Posts, Check Eligibility, Fee, Age Limit
basic_details.post_name: Chief Medical Officer, Project Engineer & Estate Officer/Executive Engineer, Medical Officer, Technical Officer, Junior Superintendent, Junior Library Information Assistant
basic_details.short_information: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 offers a good opportunity for candidates seeking non-teaching government jobs in a premier technical institute. The table below summarizes the key details of this recruitment drive.

important_dates.eligibility determination date: As on the last date of application submission

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the application-cum-processing fee as per their category and the post applied for, as detailed below: | Note: SC, ST, Women, PwD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates are exempted from payment of the application fee; however, the processing fee is applicable and must be paid. The fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit prescribed for each post, along with applicable category-wise relaxation, is detailed below. | Note: As per the official notification, age relaxation of 3 years is applicable to OBC (NCL) candidates and 5 years to SC/ST candidates, only where the post is reserved for that category. Age relaxation to PwD candidates and Ex-servicemen is applicable as per government rules. Regular IIT employees who are educationally qualified may get relaxation up to a maximum of 50 years for direct recruitment across the IIT system.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil the essential educational qualifications and experience prescribed for each post as on the last date of application submission. The post-wise qualification details are given below.

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be placed in the following pay levels as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) matrix, along with allowances admissible as per Institute/Central Government norms: | Chief Medical Officer: Pay Level-13 Project Engineer & Estate Officer/Executive Engineer: Pay Level-11 Medical Officer: Pay Level-10 Technical Officer: Pay Level-10 Junior Superintendent: Pay Level-06 Junior Library Information Assistant: Pay Level-04

selection_process: the selection process for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 may include:

Screening/shortlisting of applications based on qualifications and experience (the Institute reserves the right to shortlist based on criteria higher than the minimum eligibility). Written test and/or trade test/skill test
as decided by the Screening Committee. The decision of the Institute regarding eligibility
and selection shall be final and binding on all candidates.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 by following the steps given below:
Visit the official website of IIT Mandi at www.iitmandi.ac.in or the application portal at https://iitmandint.samarth.edu.in.
Locate and click on the link for Advertisement No. IIT Mandi/Recruit./NTS/2026/02.
Register using a valid and active email ID and mobile number to create a login account.
Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and experience details accurately.
Upload scanned copies of the required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, caste/category certificates, and photo/signature, in the prescribed format.
Pay the applicable application-cum-processing fee online through the payment gateway.
Review all the details filled in the application form before final submission, as no changes will be entertained later.
Submit the application and save/print a copy of the confirmation page for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 offers a good opportunity for candidates seeking non-teaching government jobs in a premier technical institute. The table below summarizes the key details of this recruitment drive.

rows.details: Chief Medical Officer, Project Engineer & Estate Officer/Executive Engineer, Medical Officer, Technical Officer, Junior Superintendent, Junior Library Information Assistant

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates must take note of the following key dates related to IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026.

rows.date: As on the last date of application submission

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Non Teaching Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: IIT Mandi has announced a total of 11 vacancies across six non-teaching posts. The post-wise and category-wise breakup is given below. Official Notification PDF Download Link: Candidates are advised to read the detailed official notification before applying. Download IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfil the essential educational qualifications and experience prescribed for each post as on the last date of application submission. The post-wise qualification details are given below.

rows.educational_qualification: MBBS with compulsory rotating internship, or PG diploma in Medicine, or MD/MS in an appropriate branch, with minimum 5 years' service experience at Pay Level-12
Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering with 5 years' relevant experience as Engineer/Asst. Engineer in CPWD/State PWD or similar organizations
MBBS with internship plus 1 year experience, or PG diploma with 1 year experience, or MD/MS in Medicine
B.E./B.Tech or M.Sc. (CSE/IT)/MCA with 5 years' experience, or M.Tech (CSE/IT) with 1 year experience, with first class/6.5 CGPA
Bachelor's degree (min. 55%) with 8 years' experience, or Master's degree (min. 55%) with 5 years' experience, along with knowledge of office procedures and computer applications
Diploma in Library Science with 5 years' experience in a library/library computerization

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit prescribed for each post, along with applicable category-wise relaxation, is detailed below. Note: As per the official notification, age relaxation of 3 years is applicable to OBC (NCL) candidates and 5 years to SC/ST candidates, only where the post is reserved for that category. Age relaxation to PwD candidates and Ex-servicemen is applicable as per government rules. Regular IIT employees who are educationally qualified may get relaxation up to a maximum of 50 years for direct recruitment across the IIT system.

content_sections.heading: Pay and Allowances (Salary)
content_sections.text: The selected candidates will be placed in the following pay levels as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) matrix, along with allowances admissible as per Institute/Central Government norms: Chief Medical Officer: Pay Level-13 Project Engineer & Estate Officer/Executive Engineer: Pay Level-11 Medical Officer: Pay Level-10 Technical Officer: Pay Level-10 Junior Superintendent: Pay Level-06 Junior Library Information Assistant: Pay Level-04

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: As per the official notification, the selection process for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 may include: Screening/shortlisting of applications based on qualifications and experience (the Institute reserves the right to shortlist based on criteria higher than the minimum eligibility). Written test and/or trade test/skill test, wherever applicable, as decided by the Screening Committee. The decision of the Institute regarding eligibility, shortlisting, and selection shall be final and binding on all candidates.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Candidates are required to pay the application-cum-processing fee as per their category and the post applied for, as detailed below: Note: SC, ST, Women, PwD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates are exempted from payment of the application fee; however, the processing fee is applicable and must be paid. The fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 by following the steps given below:

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 10.08.2026 up to 23:59 hrs (IST).

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 11 vacancies are available across six non-teaching posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay level for the post of Chief Medical Officer at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: The post of Chief Medical Officer carries Pay Level-13.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application-cum-processing fee ranges from Rs. 300 to Rs. 1,000, depending on the post and category, with SC/ST/Women/PwD/Ex-Servicemen candidates exempted from the application fee (processing fee still applies).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Junior Superintendent post at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for the Junior Superintendent post is 35 years for UR candidates, with applicable relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website www.iitmandi.ac.in or the application portal https://iitmandint.samarth.edu.in before the last date.
